member.name: P:Shared.Models.Alarm.Severity
member.summary: How serious this alarm is when it fires (defaults to ).

member.name: P:Shared.Models.AlarmEvent.PanelId
member.summary: Denormalized for queries and DTOs without loading .

member.name: P:Shared.Models.AlarmEvent.TriggeredValue
member.summary: Scaled reading value (Gain * raw + Offset) at the time the alarm fired.

member.name: P:Shared.Models.AlarmEvent.PanelName
member.summary: Panel display name snapshot at event time.

member.name: P:Shared.Models.FlowConsumption.ReadingsLastHour
member.summary: Readings from the last hour for this panel.

member.name: T:Shared.Models.CommandResponsePayload
member.summary: Payload for MQTT topic iocloud/response/{gatewayId}/command. command_index 2 = system.
